system.description: You can feed on the life force of others, usually in a manner that involves blood drinking or other close physical contact. The victim must be an intelligent creature who is either helpless or cooperative. With one Main Action, you can drain 1d6 hit points and use them to heal damage you have suffered. If they cooperate, you can choose how many of their hit points to drain; if they resist, you might accidentally kill them. You cannot drain more hit points than they have. Draining a human to death will negate any need you may have for food or water for the next week.
